raw.name: d3lib
raw.description: Full d3 v7 namespace — all d3.* symbols available as d3lib.*

raw.name: mountBarChart
raw.description: Mount a bar chart into a host element. Returns { svg, update(data), destroy() }

raw.name: mountLineChart
raw.description: Mount a line chart into a host element. Returns { svg, update(data), destroy() }

raw.name: mountPieChart
raw.description: Mount a pie/donut chart into a host element. Returns { svg, update(data), destroy() }

wrappers.name: D3Canvas
wrappers.description: General-purpose D3 canvas — fires zeb:d3:ready with { d3, container, id }
